summary: Frontend testing complete for Map UI controls fix in 3D mode and 2D Mapbox migration. All features verified working: 2D map now uses Mapbox dark-v11 raster tiles (dark theme with gray roads), 3D map controls (zoom in/out, follow user, overview mode) all work correctly with the Mapbox GL map instance, 2D/3D mode switching works correctly.

minor_issues.issue: 504 Gateway Timeout when fetching traffic infrastructure - cosmetic only, does not affect core functionality
Chart dimension warning 'width(-1) height(-1)' still occurs occasionally
minor_issues.note: Known issue from previous iterations - does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx line 97 - MAPBOX_TOKEN defined from process.env.REACT_APP_MAPBOX_TOKEN
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx lines 1073-1095 - 2D map uses Mapbox dark-v11 raster tiles via L.tileLayer with correct URL pattern
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx line 188 - mapboxMapRef created to store 3D Mapbox GL map instance
VERIFIED: MapControls.tsx line 7 - mapboxMapRef prop added to component
VERIFIED: MapControls.tsx lines 208-225 - Zoom buttons check is3DMode and use mapboxMapRef.current.zoomIn()/zoomOut() for 3D mode
VERIFIED: MapControls.tsx lines 227-246 - Overview button uses mapboxMapRef.current.easeTo() to toggle pitch between 0 and 70
VERIFIED: MapControls.tsx lines 261-278 - Follow user button uses mapboxMapRef.current.flyTo() for 3D mode
VERIFIED: Navigation3DView.tsx line 235 - onMapRef callback exposes Mapbox GL map instance on load
VERIFIED: 2D map attribution shows 'Mapbox' instead of 'MapTiler'
VERIFIED: 3D map still uses satellite-streets-v12 style

features_tested.2d_dark_theme: PASS - Map displays dark theme with gray roads and city labels
features_tested.route_calculation: PASS - Route to Chicago calculated (462 mi, 7h 19m)
features_tested.3d_mode_switch: PASS - Clicked 2D button to switch to 3D mode
features_tested.3d_zoom_in_btn: PASS - data-testid='zoom-in-btn' clicked, map zoomed in
features_tested.3d_zoom_out_btn: PASS - data-testid='zoom-out-btn' clicked, map zoomed out
features_tested.3d_follow_user_btn: PASS - data-testid='follow-user-btn' clicked, map centered on user
features_tested.3d_overview_btn: PASS - data-testid='overview-btn' clicked, pitch toggled to 0 (overview mode)
features_tested.3d_overview_toggle_back: PASS - Overview button clicked again, pitch toggled back to 70 (navigation mode)
features_tested.3d_satellite_style: PASS - 3D view shows satellite imagery with street labels (satellite-streets-v12)
features_tested.3d_turn_banner: PASS - data-testid='3d-turn-banner' found with turn instruction
features_tested.3d_nav_bar: PASS - data-testid='3d-nav-bar' found with Distance, Time, ETA
features_tested.3d_sat_label: PASS - '3D SAT' label visible at bottom-right
features_tested.2d_3d_switching: PASS - Mode switching works correctly in both directions
features_tested.back_to_2d: PASS - After switching back to 2D, Mapbox tiles reload correctly

context_for_next_testing_agent: App at https://nav-emblem-display.preview.emergentagent.com. Map UI controls fix verified working. Key changes: 1) 2D map now uses Mapbox dark-v11 raster tiles (line 1077 in NavigationView.tsx), 2) mapboxMapRef stores 3D Mapbox GL instance (line 188), 3) MapControls receives mapboxMapRef prop and uses it for zoom/follow/overview in 3D mode. Test data-testids: zoom-in-btn, zoom-out-btn, follow-user-btn, overview-btn. 3D HUD testids: 3d-turn-banner, 3d-nav-bar, 3d-speed-limit, 3d-current-speed, 3d-stat-dist, 3d-stat-time, 3d-stat-eta.
